categories.name: Religious Texts
categories.description: Sacred scriptures and spiritual writings — all public domain

items.name: Holy Bible — King James Version (KJV)
items.description: The 1611 King James Version. The most widely recognized English Bible translation in history.

items.name: Holy Bible — World English Bible (WEB)
items.description: A modern English translation explicitly dedicated to the public domain. Readable, contemporary language.

items.name: Holy Bible — American Standard Version (ASV)
items.description: The 1901 American Standard Version. A formal, word-for-word translation valued for theological study.

items.name: Holy Bible — Young's Literal Translation (YLT)
items.description: Robert Young's 1862 hyper-literal translation, preserving the verb tenses of the original Hebrew and Greek.

items.name: The Quran — Shakir Translation
items.description: M.H. Shakir's English translation of the Quran. A widely respected public domain rendering.

items.name: Bhagavad Gita — Edwin Arnold Translation
items.description: Sir Edwin Arnold's 1885 verse translation 'The Song Celestial'. A classic of Hindu scripture.

items.name: The Book of Mormon
items.description: The founding scripture of the Latter-day Saint movement, first published in 1830.

items.name: Tao Te Ching — Legge Translation
items.description: James Legge's public domain translation of Laozi's foundational Taoist text.

categories.name: Survival Manuals
categories.description: Military, government, and field survival guides — all public domain

items.name: US Army FM 21-76 — Survival Manual (1992)
items.description: The original Army survival field manual. Water, food, shelter, fire, navigation, signaling, and more.

items.name: US Army FM 3-05.70 — Survival (2002)
items.description: The updated Army survival manual. More comprehensive than FM 21-76.

items.name: FEMA — Are You Ready? Guide
items.description: FEMA's official comprehensive emergency preparedness guide for households and communities.

items.name: FEMA — CERT Training Manual
items.description: Community Emergency Response Team training guide. Search and rescue, first aid, disaster operations.

items.name: USDA — Complete Guide to Home Canning
items.description: The definitive guide to food preservation: canning, pickling, fermenting. Extends food shelf life for years.

items.name: EPA — Emergency Drinking Water Disinfection
items.description: How to make water safe to drink using bleach, boiling, and other methods without power or filters.

categories.name: Medical & Health
categories.description: First aid and medical guides for when professional care isn't available

items.name: Where There Is No Doctor
items.description: The world's most-used health care manual for people without access to doctors. Published by Hesperian.

items.name: Where There Is No Dentist
items.description: Dental care and emergency tooth pain management without professional equipment or supplies.

items.name: A Book for Midwives
items.description: Emergency obstetric care, childbirth, and newborn care without hospital resources.

items.name: Red Cross — Family Disaster Plan
items.description: Family emergency planning guide from the American Red Cross.

categories.name: Law & Government
categories.description: Founding documents, legal references, and civil rights texts

items.name: US Constitution & Bill of Rights
items.description: The complete United States Constitution with all 27 amendments. Know your rights.

items.name: Declaration of Independence (1776)
items.description: The original Declaration of Independence. A foundational document of American liberty.

items.name: UN Universal Declaration of Human Rights
items.description: The 1948 United Nations declaration of fundamental human rights recognized internationally.

items.name: Black's Law Dictionary (1910 Edition)
items.description: The standard American legal dictionary. Definitions of legal terms, precedents, and procedure.

categories.name: Philosophy & Wisdom
categories.description: Classic philosophical texts for thought, perspective, and guidance

items.name: Meditations — Marcus Aurelius
items.description: The private journal of Roman Emperor Marcus Aurelius. Timeless Stoic philosophy on resilience and duty.

items.name: Enchiridion — Epictetus
items.description: The handbook of Epictetus. How to maintain inner freedom regardless of external circumstances.

items.name: The Art of War — Sun Tzu
items.description: Sun Tzu's 2500-year-old military strategy masterpiece. Applicable to conflict, negotiation, and survival.

categories.name: Wikipedia Offline
categories.description: Curated offline Wikipedia archives — no internet required. Opens in Kiwix.

items.name: Wikipedia — Medicine & Health
items.description: A comprehensive offline archive of Wikipedia's medical articles. Drug references, diseases, procedures.

items.name: Wikipedia — Outdoor & Wilderness
items.description: Wikipedia's survival, wilderness, and outdoor skills articles compiled offline.

items.name: Wiktionary — English Dictionary
items.description: Full offline English dictionary. Definitions, etymologies, and translations of over 7 million words.
